title: Admin Rights Manager (com.adminrights.manager)
description: Configures the Admin Rights Management tool — behavior, branding, and remediation options.

OrganizationName.title: Organization Name
OrganizationName.description: Your organization's short name displayed in the app header bar.

DepartmentName.title: Department Name
DepartmentName.description: Department name shown after the organization name in the header (e.g., IT Services, IT Security). If identical to OrganizationName, only one is shown.

SupportContactName.title: Support Contact Name
SupportContactName.description: Display name for your support team, shown in the footer and on error screens.

SupportPhone.title: Support Phone
SupportPhone.description: Phone number shown as a clickable link in the footer. Leave empty to hide.

SupportEmail.title: Support Email
SupportEmail.description: Email address shown as a clickable mailto link in the footer. Leave empty to hide.

SupportWebsiteURL.title: Support Website URL
SupportWebsiteURL.description: IT department website URL shown as a clickable link in the footer. Leave empty to hide.

SupportRequestURL.title: Support Request URL
SupportRequestURL.description: URL for submitting admin rights elevation requests. Powers the 'Open Help Desk Portal' button. Leave empty to hide.

PolicyURL.title: Policy URL
PolicyURL.description: URL to your admin rights policy document. Shown as a clickable link in the header. Leave empty to show plain text.

PolicyMessage.title: Policy Message
PolicyMessage.description: The warning text shown to users explaining why they need to remediate. Write this in your organization's voice.
PolicyMessage.default: Your account currently has administrator privileges on this Mac. Per organizational policy, standard user accounts should not retain persistent admin rights. This poses a security risk to your device and the network. Please remediate below or submit a request if you require elevated access for your role.

AccentColorHex.title: Accent Color (Hex)
AccentColorHex.description: Your primary brand color as a hex value (e.g., #1b386d). Used for buttons, links, and accent elements. The app automatically adapts all other colors for light and dark mode based on this value.

LogoImagePath.title: Logo Image Path
LogoImagePath.description: Absolute path to a custom logo image file on disk (PNG with transparent background recommended). The installer PKG should place this file alongside the app. Leave empty to use the default shield icon.

NagIntervalSeconds.title: Nag Interval (Seconds)
NagIntervalSeconds.description: How often the nag window appears, in seconds. This value is for display purposes — the actual interval is controlled by the LaunchAgent plist.

AllowDeferral.title: Allow Deferral
AllowDeferral.description: Allow users to close the window without choosing an action. If false, the window stays floating until they click Remediate or Submit Request.

GracePeriodDays.title: Grace Period (Days)
GracePeriodDays.description: Number of days before forced remediation. Set to 0 for nag-only mode (never force).

ShowSubmitRequestOption.title: Show Submit Request Option
ShowSubmitRequestOption.description: Show the 'Submit Request — I Need Admin Access' button. Set to false to only allow remediation with no request option.

JamfConnectAppPath.title: Jamf Connect App Path
JamfConnectAppPath.description: Path to the Jamf Connect application for detection in the diagnostic report.

JamfConnectElevationURL.title: Jamf Connect Elevation URL
JamfConnectElevationURL.description: Jamf Connect elevation workflow URL. Leave empty if not using Jamf Connect elevation.

EnableLocalAuditLog.title: Enable Local Audit Log
EnableLocalAuditLog.description: Write a local log file of all remediation actions for compliance and audit purposes.

AuditLogPath.title: Audit Log Path
AuditLogPath.description: File path for the local audit log.
